name: code-breaking-changes
tagline: Directs a search for breaking changes across app-server APIs, CLI params, config loading, and session resuming.
verdict: Extremely thin: a two-word description gives no trigger guidance, no concrete search commands or criteria, no defined output/deliverable, and no scope exclusions. Functionally a checklist prompt rather than an executable procedure. No security concerns — it only reads and analyzes.

highlights.summary: description: 'Breaking changes' — no situation, phrasing, or task type stated.
No exclusions or out-of-scope pointers anywhere; broad enough to misfire on general code review tasks.
'Search for breaking changes in external integration surfaces' names no command, tool, or criterion for what counts as breaking.
